channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLbusinessAndMarkets
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLbusinessAndMarkets, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Long-term mortgage rate dips back to just above 6%
item.description: The average long-term U.S. mortgage rate is holding at just above 6% after reversing a modest uptick in recent weeks, just as the housing market close...

item.title: Trump’s anti-DEI policies are hurting college-educated Black women
item.description: Faced with a sluggish job market, American workers got a bit of good news yesterday, with the release of the latest jobs report . Employers added 130,...

item.title: McDonald’s Is Launching a New McCafé Beverage Line Nationwide After Tests ‘Exceeded Expectations’
item.description: A craving for refreshing drinks is shaping fast-food chains.

item.title: Anthropic has vowed to pay for electricity price hikes from its data centers. Its plan is short on details
item.description: If you live near an AI data center, you may already be seeing higher electricity bills . But if that data center is for Anthropic, the AI company now ...

item.title: One of Wall Street’s most feared hedge fund managers on the decline of the dollar: gold is ‘becoming the reserve asset’
item.description: Greenlight Capital's David Einhorn, known for his “Einhorn Effect” and years of touting gold, says the world's central banks don't love dollars anymor...

item.title: Billionaire founder of Minecraft slams anyone advocating using AI to write code as ‘incompetent or evil’
item.description: Minecraft creator Markus Persson has just issued a warning: That AI is “being forced down our throats” and that leaders behind the push are “evil.”

item.title: Ring’s Super Bowl Ad Prompted a Public Freakout. Wyze Turned It Into a Marketing Win
item.description: One brand’s advertising loss is another brand’s advertising victory.

item.title: An AI-Native Rival to Carvana Just Emerged From Stealth With $31 Million
item.description: The startup, called Ever, aims to be a platform for people to buy and sell EVs.

item.title: Crypto lender BlockFills suspends withdrawals for clients in latest blow to the blockchain sector
item.description: During the digital assets crash of 2022, lenders made similarly protective moves.

item.title: Hackers Are Hammering Google’s Gemini With Prompts to Steal the LLM—Every AI Company Should Be Worried
item.description: Google says smaller companies are next.

item.title: Chipotle Has a 4-Part Plan to Boost Flat Sales. Part 1 Is ‘the Most Celebrated Limited-Time Offer in History’
item.description: In an earnings call, CEO Scott Boatwright said the Mexican restaurant chain will increase its ‘menu innovation cadence’ in 2026.

item.title: Instagram boss reveals he’s paid $900k per year plus stock worth ‘tens of millions of dollars’ as he denies ‘addiction’ claims
item.description: The plaintiff’s lawyer in a landmark social media addiction trial tried to connect Adam Mosseri’s compensation with Instagram’s policy toward filters.

item.title: An AI agent just tried to shame a software engineer after he rejected its code
item.description: Sign of the times: An AI agent autonomously wrote and published a personalized attack article against an open-source software maintainer after he reje...

item.title: OpenClaw is the bad boy of AI agents. Here’s why security experts say you should beware
item.description: The open-source AI agent pushes autonomy to the edge — thrilling hobbyists and unnerving security experts

item.title: More Americans than ever love being single. But they feel penalized for it by our financial system
item.description: Single this Valentine’s Day? You’re not alone. New research from The Harris Poll shows that nearly half of Americans (46%) are not in relationships—ma...

item.title: The S&P 500 is on the verge of turning negative for the year — live updates
Dow stuck below 50,000 in final hour, S&P 500 and Nasdaq down sharply — live
Selloff moves beyond tech as investors sell first, ask questions later on AI
Senior AI staffers keep quitting — and are issuing warnings
Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq all end sharply lower as AI fears bleed beyond tech stocks
